features.title: Governed operations across the stack
features.description: Product surfaces that prove the monorepo foundation — shared design system, analytics hooks, and metadata with the main app shell.

items.title: Operational visibility
items.description: Analysis and reporting views that stay tenant-scoped. Every chart and export respects the same permission boundary as the work it summarizes.

items.title: Production workflows
items.description: Run controlled operations with audit-friendly handoffs. Orbit Case captures work once and pushes to governed destinations when policy allows.

items.title: Lynx ERP integration
items.description: Connect operational work to ERP records without losing finality. Push registries define what can cross the boundary and who can approve it.

items.title: Unified control plane
items.description: One shell for authenticated operations, shared metadata, and module boundaries. The public web surface stays aligned with the app scaffold.

faq.title: How XForge stays governed
faq.description: Afenda XForge is built for teams that cannot afford silent permission drift or unaudited cross-module push.

items.question: What is Afenda XForge?
items.answer: A governance-first ERP foundation for tenant-scoped business systems. The authenticated app shell hosts operational modules; this site is the public web surface.

items.question: How does tenant isolation work?
items.answer: Every read and write is scoped to the active organization. Shared infrastructure does not blur tenant boundaries — permissions and audit trails stay final.

items.question: What is Orbit Case?
items.answer: Universal work capture with governed push to downstream modules. Push registries define destinations, required fields, and who may execute a push.

items.question: How does the web app relate to the product app?
items.answer: They share the design system, analytics provider, SEO presets, and metadata conventions. Marketing content lives here; operations live in the authenticated shell.

items.question: Where do I start?
items.answer: Open the app shell to sign in or create an account. Use contact if you need a guided rollout conversation.

cta.title: Open the governed app shell
cta.description: Sign in to tenant-scoped operations with audit trails and permission finality built in. The public site stays in sync with the same monorepo foundation.
